case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS TAILORCRAFT CLEANERS INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAILORCRAFT CLEANERS INC. $2,715.80 PRINCIPAL, $14.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,730.30 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT TAILORCRAFT CLEANERS INC.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,715.80 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 AS TO DEFENDANT TAILORCRAFT CLEANERS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-15-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TAILORCRAFT CLEANERS INC.
